# VERIFY: #67 — feat: create /ship L2 recipe for autonomous branch-to-main delivery
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output -->

**Intent:** Verify that the `/ship` L2 recipe is structurally correct, behaviorally sound, properly integrated with existing L1 recipes, respects all framework ADRs, and delivers zero-friction autonomous branch-to-main delivery.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Recipe directory structure follows the canonical pattern (SKILL.md + reference/intent.yaml + templates/)
- [ ] SKILL.md frontmatter declares `name: ship`, `user-invocable: true`, `model: sonnet`, correct allowed-tools
- [ ] Version table declares `Level: L2` and `Distinct Agents: 2`
- [ ] `reference/intent.yaml` contains intent string, C1-C11 constraints (pre-flight and behavioral), and F1-F7 failure conditions
- [ ] SKILL.md `## Intent` section has the standard load directive referencing intent.yaml
- [ ] Recipe uses at most 2 distinct agents (repo-orchestrator, project-orchestrator) — within L2 ≤5 limit
- [ ] Guardian logic is defined inline in SKILL.md; no reference to workflow-guardian agent
- [ ] Steps 1 and 2 invoke commit-code and create-pr L1s via the Skill tool; Steps 3-5 use direct repo-orchestrator delegations
- [ ] Skip-logic handles: no uncommitted changes (skip step 1), PR already exists (skip step 2), both (skip 1 and 2)
- [ ] Self-resolution CAN list explicitly excludes code/documentation changes; max attempt counts defined for each strategy
- [ ] Evidence path is `.meridian/{issue}/evidence/ship/{YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS}.md` (matches config.yaml STM pattern)
- [ ] `checkpoint.md` template follows ADR 008 mandatory schema (Metadata, Task List, Completed Outputs, Current Step, Inputs Needed)
- [ ] `guardian-decision.md` template captures: step name, decision, reason, evidence summary, blockers
- [ ] `final-report.md` template includes: issue, branch, PR number/URL, merge commit, steps executed (with status), guardian decisions
- [ ] Guardian halt presentation includes: blocker description, intent preserved, completed steps, failed step details, Tether/Vanish options, self-resolution attempts
- [ ] Recovery section: pre-flight failures are hard halts; runtime failures follow recovery loop with max retry counts
- [ ] SKILL.md Role section forbids Bash/Grep/Glob/git/gh commands by the orchestrator
- [ ] `commit-code` L1 modified to check `ship_context.auto_approve` and bypass checkpoint when present and true
- [ ] `create-pr` L1 modified to check `ship_context.auto_approve` and bypass checkpoint C5 when present and true AND quality is clean
- [ ] `repo-orchestrator` Bash scope updated to include `gh pr merge` and `git checkout {base_branch} && git pull` as named write exceptions
- [ ] Recipe deploys correctly to `~/.claude/skills/ship/SKILL.md` after `/sync-claude`
- [ ] `docs/components/recipes.md` updated to list `/ship` recipe

---

## Verification Steps

| Gate | Step | Method | Expected Outcome |
|------|------|--------|-----------------|
| G-001 | Directory structure | Glob `core/components/recipes/ship/**` | SKILL.md, reference/intent.yaml, templates/checkpoint.md, templates/guardian-decision.md, templates/final-report.md all present |
| G-002 | SKILL.md frontmatter | Read first 8 lines of SKILL.md | `name: ship`, `user-invocable: true`, `model: sonnet`, allowed-tools correct |
| G-003 | Level L2 declaration | Read Version table in SKILL.md | `Level \| L2` present |
| G-004 | intent.yaml completeness | Read intent.yaml, count C and F entries | C1-C3 pre-flight, C4-C11 behavioral, F1-F7 failure conditions — all present |
| G-005 | intent.yaml load directive | Read `## Intent` section of SKILL.md | Load directive referencing `reference/intent.yaml` present |
| G-006 | Agent limit | Count distinct agent names in SKILL.md workflow | Exactly 2: repo-orchestrator, project-orchestrator |
| G-007 | Inline guardian | Grep SKILL.md for `workflow-guardian` | Zero matches; guardian decision matrix present within workflow section |
| G-008 | L1 invocations | Read Steps 1-5 | Step 1 references commit-code, Step 2 references create-pr; Steps 3-5 invoke repo-orchestrator directly |
| G-009 | Skip-logic | Read Step 0 output contract and Steps 1-2 | Three skip conditions documented and handled |
| G-010 | Self-resolution scope | Read self-resolution section | CAN list excludes code/docs changes; CANNOT list present; max attempt counts defined |
| G-011 | Evidence path | Read Step 6 (Report) | Path matches `.meridian/{issue}/evidence/ship/{YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS}.md` |
| G-012 | Checkpoint template | Read templates/checkpoint.md | All ADR 008 mandatory fields: Metadata, Task List, Completed Outputs, Current Step, Inputs Needed |
| G-013 | Guardian-decision template | Read templates/guardian-decision.md | Fields: step, decision, reason, evidence summary, blockers |
| G-014 | Final report template | Read templates/final-report.md | Fields: issue, branch, PR, merge commit, steps table, guardian decisions |
| G-015 | Halt presentation | Read guardian halt section in SKILL.md | All elements: blocker, intent preserved, completed steps, failed step, Tether/Vanish, self-resolution |
| G-016 | Recovery section | Read Recovery section | Pre-flight = hard halt; runtime = recovery loop; max retries specified |
| G-017 | Forbidden tools | Read Role section | Bash/Grep/Glob/git/gh forbidden for orchestrator |
| G-018 | Orchestrator-owned steps | Read Steps 0, 6 and guardian evaluation sections | All marked "orchestrator owns" or equivalent |
| G-019 | NWWI enforcement | Read C3 in intent.yaml and evidence path template | Issue number required at pre-flight; paths use `{issue}` |
| G-020 | commit-code modification | Read commit-code Step 3 checkpoint logic | `ship_context.auto_approve` check present; bypasses prompt when set |
| G-021 | create-pr modification | Read create-pr Step 2 checkpoint logic | `ship_context.auto_approve` check with quality gate; bypasses prompt when quality clean |
| G-022 | repo-orchestrator scope | Read repo-orchestrator Bash section | `gh pr merge` and `git checkout {base} && git pull` listed as write exceptions |
| G-023 | Sync deployment | Verify `~/.claude/skills/ship/SKILL.md` exists | Recipe deployed to global location |
| G-024 | Docs update | Read `docs/components/recipes.md` | `/ship` recipe listed in recipe catalog |

---

## Edge Cases

| Scenario | Expected Behavior |
|----------|------------------|
| Branch has no uncommitted changes AND no PR exists | Skip step 1 (commit), execute steps 2-5 normally |
| Branch has no uncommitted changes AND PR already exists | Skip steps 1 and 2, proceed to step 3 (review) with existing PR number |
| Branch has uncommitted changes AND PR already exists | Skip step 2 (create-pr), execute step 1 (commit) then steps 3-5 with existing PR |
| Merge conflict detected at step 4 | HALT. Create GitHub issue documenting conflict. Present Tether/Vanish with evidence. |
| CI checks failing when merge attempted | HALT. Record in evidence. Present blocker to user. Do NOT force merge. |
| Branch deletion fails after merge | Record in evidence as non-critical warning. Do NOT halt — merge already succeeded. |
| `checkout main && pull` fails (dirty working tree) | Stash changes, checkout, pop stash. If still failing, HALT with warning. |
| commit-code L1 halts (user rejects via Vanish within L1) | ship receives failure. Guardian escalates. ship HALTS — F7 condition. |
| create-pr creates a draft PR | Guardian notes in evidence but does NOT halt — draft PRs can be reviewed and merged. |
| analyze-pr finds REVIEW-status must-have items (not FAIL) | Guardian auto-approves with warnings in evidence — REVIEW ≠ FAIL. |
| Network failure during `gh pr merge` | Self-resolve: retry once after 5s. If still failing, HALT — create tracking issue. |
| Issue number not in branch name | Pre-flight C3 fails — hard halt before any work begins. |
| `ship` invoked when already on main | Pre-flight C1 fails — hard halt: "Protected branch" |
| PR review finds warnings but no blockers | Guardian auto-approves with warnings logged in evidence. Merge proceeds. |
